geminiApiKey.title: Gemini API Key
geminiApiKey.description: The API key used to authenticate requests to the Google Gemini API.

geminiModel.title: Gemini Model
geminiModel.description: The model to use for the Copilot (e.g., gemini-3.5-flash, gemini-3.1-pro-preview). New API keys usually cannot access Gemini 2.5.
